tasks.label: gstack: Office Hours (feature scoping)
args: Run /gstack-office-hours to help scope this new feature work with a YC-style product interrogation.

tasks.label: gstack: Eng Review (architecture decision)
args: Run /gstack-plan-eng-review to review the current architecture plan with diagrams and test planning.

tasks.label: gstack: Review (pre-PR, manual)
args: Run /gstack-review to perform a pre-PR code review of the current diff. Focus on correctness, architecture, test coverage, and SQL/LLM safety.

tasks.label: gstack: Security Scan (CSO)
args: Run /gstack-cso to perform an OWASP Top 10 + STRIDE security audit of the current codebase.

tasks.label: gstack: Ship PR checklist
args: Run /gstack-ship to go through the full PR shipping checklist: sync base, run tests, review diff, bump version, update changelog, commit, push, open PR.

tasks.label: gstack: Investigate (debug failure)
args: Run /gstack-investigate to perform systematic root-cause analysis on the current failure with hypothesis testing.
